programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie harnesses the power of time to transform simple ingredients into flavorful goods that'll stick around for a long time. Learn the basics of preserving, pickling & curing to make dinner anything but a struggle. It just takes a little patience.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: It's no secret that pasta is Frankie's favorite; he's serving it up all night without even opening his fridge.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie's slicing, mashing and smashing his way through the spud species, a staple for any Struggle kitchen.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie teaches several methods for cooking eggs; the scramble, the omelet, and the Benedict; learn to make them just the way one likes them.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie cooks his way back in time with his favorite vintage recipes. These oldie-but-goodie dishes are not only nostalgic and comforting, but they'll also fill you up without costing you a pretty penny.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Warm and hearty bowls of veggies, beans, pasta, and more, these soups will have you returning for seconds all year round. Frankie's soup blueprints can turn everyday ingredients into extraordinary soups, with endless flavor opportunity.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: In a sandwich, every component plays a role. With a supporting cast of fixin's, and Frankie's cost-saving homemade twists, these sandwiches just might steal the show.

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Who knew mayo could be such a savvy secret agent? It's a controversial condiment that can unlock the buttery, crispy, decadent codes of our favorite dishes, without leaving a trace of mayo-ness. Best of all, it's easy to make at home!

programme.title: Legend of the Lost

programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The investigators return to Kentucky to inspect some recent casts of Bigfoot tracks; after a crazy night with Ernie the Turtleman,, they have a horrifying night of their own, using Louisville Sluggers for knockers.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot

programme.title: Pets & Pickers

programme.title: Pets & Pickers

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Troublesome alligators must be removed from a school playground, a nursery and a housing development; a Burmese python sinks its fangs into Tre.

programme.title: Gator Boys

programme.title: My Cat From Hell

programme.title: My Cat From Hell

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia's daughter faces a difficult decision about her pet; a family of pit bulls in an abandoned house is rescued.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer; agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds; health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

programme.desc: While using the LDWF's spy in the sky drone, agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish; a family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets; two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search-and-rescue mission for a missing fisherman; agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters, and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: As Hurricane Ida makes landfall, wildlife agents deploy to help the people of Louisiana; an injured woman is trapped in a flooded hotel; elderly neighbors await rescue in punishing conditions; lifesaving supplies must be delivered to those in need.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is in the magic town of Maní to learn about something sacred to the Mayans - bees and honey. A group of women who protect the endangered Melipona, a stingless bee native to Yucatán, invites her to join in a Mayan energy cleansing ritual.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tekit, the capital of the Guayabera, Pati encounters a tale of sons going against their father's wishes to follow their own path. Pati meets a farmer's son who went against his father to build a family business making the iconic Guayabera shirts.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the streets of Yucatán's capital, Mérida. She tries the best tacos in Mérida at Wayan'e. The aroma of freshly made cookies lures her to Dondé Fabric, where their globitos and bizcochitos are an important part of Mérida's mornings.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Chef Wilson Alonzo in his hometown of Halachó to prepare a traditional Cochinita Pibil in an underground pit. Pati helps Wilson prepare the achiote marinade, along with his grandmother who taught him traditional cooking.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati arrives in Motul, a town in the history books for Yucatán's once thriving henequén industry and for the egg dish Huevos Motuleños. Pati meets Doña Evelia, who put Motul back on the map with her world-famous recipe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients that make recados unique.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: No trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the most unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's league of their own. She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit two hotels that have utilized their desert location in the United Arab Emirates to offer guests unique stays found in a few places in the world.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit the vast continent of the USA. From the hustle and bustle of the east to the relaxed, atmospheric west, two contrasting hotels offer an American adventure with a difference.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In this episode we visit two completely different parts of the African continent, both offering guests a unique and contrasting flavour of Africa.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In this episode we're in the nation's capital of India - New Delhi and in 'The City of lakes' Udaipur at two Oberoi hotels where the standard of service takes hotel hospitality to a whole new level.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Vietnam - a country known for its tropical landscapes, exotic Asian cuisine, and vibrant culture is enjoying a new surge in popularity as a go-to travel destination. And at the forefront of this booming tourism scene are two incredible hotels!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred and his former boss, Chef Michel Roux Jr. are in Paris experiencing the signature dish of a classic restaurant and enjoying the simple pleasures of a perfect ham baguette.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred travels to South Devon with chef and restauranteur Angela Hartnett. From Angela's all-time favourite restaurant in Dartmouth to an incredible floating cafe on the River Exe.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Caines takes Fred to Burgundy to amazing places to eat serving the finest French country cooking and exquisite patisserie.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Tom Kerridge takes Fred to Edinburgh to enjoy stunning local produce at one of the City's most famous fine dining restaurants and to sample Scotland's best fish and chips.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is heading to Bristol for a winter treat in the company of Michel Roux Junior. Michel can't wait to show Fred his favourites, from the perfect French bistro to a festive countryside escape and Jamaican jerk turkey.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

Featuring interviews with Luke Tingle of Daktronics and DXC's Raul Fernandez.

programme.title: Fractured Flickers
programme.desc: Hans Conried and a celebrity guest present a succession of film clips from the silent picture era dubbed over with comedic dialogue and sound effects.

programme.title: Ben-Hur
programme.desc: An enslaved Judean prince (Charlton Heston) meets his Roman betrayer (Stephen Boyd), a former friend, in a chariot race.

programme.title: The Robe
programme.desc: The red robe worn by Christ links a Roman tribune (Richard Burton), his Christian lover (Jean Simmons) and a Greek slave (Victor Mature).

programme.title: Ben-Hur
programme.desc: An enslaved Judean prince (Charlton Heston) meets his Roman betrayer (Stephen Boyd), a former friend, in a chariot race.

programme.title: The Bible
programme.desc: Book of Genesis stories include Adam (Michael Parks) and Eve, Abraham (George C. Scott), and the Tower of Babel.

programme.title: The Ox-Bow Incident
programme.desc: Walter Van Tilburg Clark's novel inspires an account of a lynch mob that seeks revenge for a rancher's murder.

programme.title: Baffled!
programme.desc: An ESP expert (Susan Hampshire) advises an auto racer (Leonard Nimoy) whose visions spell danger for anyone who appears in them.

programme.title: The Sand Pebbles
programme.desc: Multiple Oscar nominations went to this tale of a cynical sailor's experiences on an American gunboat in 1926 China.

programme.title: The Reivers
programme.desc: A Mississippi boy (Mitch Vogel) drives to Memphis with two rascals (Steve McQueen, Rupert Crosse) in his family's new 1905 Winton.

programme.title: Rebecca of Sunnybrook Farm
programme.desc: After Rebecca is mistakenly rejected at an audition for a radio advertising campaign, her stepfather takes her upstate.

programme.title: Angels in the Outfield
programme.desc: The Pittsburgh Pirates' manager (Paul Douglas) sees hope after a newswoman (Janet Leigh) reports a girl saw angels on their side.

programme.title: The Kid From Left Field
programme.desc: A big-league bat boy (Billy Chapin) ends his team's slump with tips from his washed-up ex-player father (Dan Dailey).

programme.title: Palm Springs Weekend
programme.desc: A medical student (Troy Donahue) and a Hollywood high-school girl (Connie Stevens) join spring-break fun in the California resort.

programme.title: It Happens Every Spring
programme.desc: A professor (Ray Milland) becomes a World Series pitcher with his secret formula for wood-repellent screwballs.

programme.title: Nothing Sacred
programme.desc: A circulation-hungry newspaper brings a terminally ill Vermont woman to New York as a publicity stunt.

programme.title: My Man Godfrey
programme.desc: Socialite Irene Bullock needs a forgotten man to win a scavenger hunt and finds Godfrey Park, who resides in a dump by the East River. She hires him as a butler, to the chagrin of her spoiled sister Cornelia, who seeks to get Godfrey fired.

programme.title: A Fantastic Fear of Everything
programme.desc: Becoming paranoid after his research into serial killers, a writer (Simon Pegg) must confront his numerous demons in order to make it to an important meeting about his screenplay.

programme.title: The Day the World Ended
programme.desc: A geologist (Richard Denning), a captain's daughter (Lori Nelson) and five others flee mutants after nuclear war.

programme.title: Battle Beyond the Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir (Richard Thomas) recruits a space cowboy (George Peppard) and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarian's army.

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: A time-warped astronaut (James Franciscus) lands on ape-ruled Earth and finds telepathic mutants worshiping an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Escape From the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Cornelius (Roddy McDowall), Zira (Kim Hunter) and Milo, apes from the future, escape to 1970s Los Angeles and pose a threat.

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Caesar the ape (Roddy McDowall) leads simians in revolt against the governor (Don Murray) enslaving them on future Earth.

programme.title: Battle for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Gorilla general Aldo (Claude Akins) hounds ape leader Caesar (Roddy McDowall) and what's left of humanity on simian-ruled future Earth.

programme.title: A Boy and His Dog
programme.desc: A young man and his talking canine set out in search of food, shelter and females in a post-apocalyptic wasteland.

programme.title: Ben-Hur
programme.desc: An enslaved Judean prince (Charlton Heston) meets his Roman betrayer (Stephen Boyd), a former friend, in a chariot race.

programme.title: The Last Hard Men
programme.desc: An escaped convict (James Coburn) kidnaps a retired sheriff's (Charlton Heston) daughter (Barbara Hershey) in 1909 Arizona.

programme.title: Wild Rovers
programme.desc: An old cowboy (William Holden) and his young partner (Ryan O'Neal) try to finance a dream ranch by robbing a bank.

programme.title: Table 19
programme.desc: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, E

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, b

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: Spring Breakers
programme.desc: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aar

programme.title: The LEGO Batman Movie
programme.desc: There are big changes brewing in Gotham, but if Batman (Will Arnett) wants to save the city from the Joker's (Zach Galifianakis) hostile takeover, he may have to drop the lone vigilante thing, try to work with others and maybe, just maybe, learn to lighten up. Maybe his superhero sidekick Robin (Michael Cera) and loyal butler Alfred (Ralph Fiennes) can show him a thing or two.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Writer Greg Russo arrives at Ludlow College to support his daughter Katie as her marriage begins to implode.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: When Katie's future at Ludlow is thrown into question, Walt offers Greg a deal to keep them both on campus.

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

programme.title: Date Night
programme.desc: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

programme.title: Clear History
programme.desc: An angry man concocts an elaborate plan for revenge when his old boss visits the island that he calls home.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally p

programme.title: Tour de Pharmacy
programme.desc: Five competitors provide an inside look at the world of professional cycling and its checkered history with doping.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. programme.desc: A baby shower makes Grace and Will question their life choices; Karen and Jack find a way to combine child labor with musical theater.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Against Jack's advice, Will rekindles a relationship with his first love; Grace reluctantly fights for Karen's civil rights when a bakery refuses to make a cake she wants.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace brings Will for support when she goes home to celebrate her deceased mother's birthday; Jack's faith in love is crushed after a breakup; a secret in Karen's marriage is uncovered.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace's father and Will's mother end up making a surprising and upsetting connection; Jack rebounds from his breakup with a new love; Karen must decide between her husband and her lover.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace's accidental run-in with a curmudgeon she follows on Twitter smacks of romance; Jack makes a terrible impression on Estefan's family after a numbing cream incident; Will helps Karen protect her most prized possession.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: After Will and Grace's parents get married, big changes are afoot for the gang: Will gets a teaching job and a beard, Grace decides to run for office, Jack prepares to settle down with Estefan and Karen goes missing.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Jack learns what song his grandson Skip intends to perform at his church talent show, he fears for his safety; Karen faces off with Beverley Leslie over her piece of border wall; Grace and Noah try to have sex; Will unleashes his inner Queen.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Now a certified psychic, Jack channels Rosario to help Karen open her heart to love again; Grace learns love means having to say she's sorry.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: While on a road trip with her father, Grace reveals a past secret, changing their relationship forever; legendary drag queen Miss Coco Peru emcees a lip-sync monologue throwdown to determine who will be Jack's best man, Will or Karen.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Will discovers Noah has a child, he promises to keep the secret from Grace; Karen and Jack's relationship is tested when she fires him from the play she's producing and replaces him with Jon Cryer.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace unintentionally meets Noah's daughter Katie; Will's mom Marilyn visits after the death of her beloved dog, but doesn't get the emotional support she expects; Jack argues with his rec center boss, Theo.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: In order to land a handsome TV news anchor with a penchant for dim, silly men, Will seeks advice from Jack on how not to be himself; Karen enlists Grace to help get photos of her ex Stan's affair with Lorraine Finster.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will, Karen and Jack unknowingly take hallucinogens, which cause Will and Jack to wonder whether they're soul mates and have Karen giving her final performance as Mrs. Stanley Walker; a high-powered client takes up with Grace's sister Janet.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace's plan to win over Will's new boss goes awry when he drops dead in their apartment; Estefan and Karen's mutual dislike puts Jack in full damage control mode at his birthday dinner.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will uses a mock trial in an attempt to repair the rift between Karen and her stepdaughter; Grace and Jack decide to go on a diet together but changing their eating habits proves harder than they thought.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Malcolm enlists Grace to help him win back Karen's affections; Will's flirtation at work lands him in an ethical dilemma; Jack's passion for performing is reignited by a chance encounter with Zusanna, the sister of his former acting teacher.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will gives local newscaster McCoy Whitman a second chance -- with Jack's help; Grace's campaign hits a snag when the deciding vote belongs to her nemesis Val; campaign manager Karen attempts to secure the winning vote by any means necessary.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack's insistence that Will be nicer to Estefan backfires; Grace unknowingly knocks over a prominent figure; when Karen discovers Noah plans to kill off the main character of her favorite romance novel, she forces him to rewrite the story.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: After her dad, Martin, is rushed to the hospital, Grace is shocked when he refuses a transfusion of Will's blood; Will's mom, Marilyn, uncharacteristically takes Martin to task; Karen's demands cause Jack to uninvite her to his wedding.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When both of their boyfriends ask to move in, Will and Grace use each other as an excuse to get out of it; a snowstorm traps Karen at the office and Jack in an elevator, where he reunites with old flame Drew and tests his commitment to monogamy.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack realizes he lost 13 gold coins he's supposed to give Estefan at their wedding to avoid a curse; Will is concerned that Grace is the only one compromising in her relationship with Noah; Karen shows up at a dinner party with her new date, Nikki.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Estefan's wedding takes a detour when they're forced to get married at the airport by their friend Miss Coco; Will's worried his relationship may turn long-distance; Grace meets a charming guy; Karen reconsiders her commitment to Nikki.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace returns from her European travels a new woman, but her elation is short-lived when she receives life-changing news; Karen teaches Will how to be better at phone sex; Jack has a yard sale to discreetly get rid of Estefan's annoying cuckoo clock.

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will discovers a way to finally get back at Jack for years of mocking his hairline; Grace is determined to prove to Mrs. Timmer she's strong enough to handle being a single mother; Karen squares off against Stan's brother in a poker game.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace get competitive over whose process of having a baby is more difficult; Jack helps Karen prove that she'll be a competent owner of her new baseball team, but Karen realizes that an old acquaintance may be the help she really needs.

programme.desc: Committed to becoming a father on his own, Will meets a potential surrogate who has stellar reviews, but her lifestyle choices give him doubts; Grace pretends to be a former famous Annie to gain entrance into AnnieCon.

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.desc: Will and Grace decide to intervene when they discover Grace's niece is dating a bisexual man; Jack gets permission from his husband to sleep with his celebrity hall pass; Karen struggles to adapt when her assistant books them on an economy flight.
